problem: What is the primary molecular cause of biological aging — can it be slowed?
hypothesis: What is the primary molecular cause of biological aging — can it be slowed? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Monoclonal. Monoclonal antibody blocking protein-protein interaction directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Human organoid model with 17 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
